# Amber Dawn Omarchy Theme

A warm light theme for Omarchy Hyprland.

## Quick Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/amarqs182/amber-dawn-omarchy-theme.git ~/.config/omarchy/themes/amber-dawn
omarchy theme set amber-dawn
```

## Features

- Warm amber/gold on soft ivory background
- All 16 ANSI terminal colors meet WCAG AA contrast (≥4.5:1)
- Includes Hermes TUI skin for light terminal mode
- 26+ Omarchy component configs auto-generated

## Palette

- Background: `#EDE8E6` (warm ivory)
- Foreground: `#2E2A28` (warm brown, 13.98:1 contrast)
- Accent: `#B07508` (amber, 4.51:1 contrast)
- Cursor: `#9A6606` (dark amber)
